description: I was just sitting in my living room watching YT vids, and decided it was time to go for just a ride. I grabbed my OM-1 and the amazing 300 f4 and went on a drive to the mountains just east of me in Alpine, CA. While driving in the Laguna Mountains east of San Diego, Ca, I saw a bunch of turkeys and got the car parked on the side of the road. While walking towards the turkeys, I saw this coyote just ambling along in the hills. It was a distant shot, however this is just my third shot of the elusive coyotes in the mountains and deserts east of San Diego. I was thrilled to say the least.
These three have been making quite the ruckus in the neighborhood recently :)
